title: Australia Urged to Protect Members of the Iranian Women’s Soccer Team
summary_full: The athletes, who are set to head home, were called ‘traitors’ by Iran’s state media after they didn’t sing their national anthem during a match in Australia.
summary_public: The athletes, who are set to head home, were called ‘traitors’ by Iran’s state media after they didn’t sing their national anthem during a match in Australia.
